_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, look returns screen data

look returns elements.notes: 9 interactive, 22 text elements on Misc tab

tap by text.notes: Tapped Controls tab, screen changed from Misc to Controls

back navigation.notes: back command returns 'Cannot go back: already at root screen' even when on a detail screen pushed via NavigationStack

input text into field.notes: Text field shows 'test input 123' after input command

scroll down.notes: Scrolled 200pt, content shifted from Item 0 to Item 2, element count increased from 15 to 21

scroll to element.notes: scroll --element only finds already-visible elements; returns 'Element not found' for off-screen items

scroll to element (deprecated scroll_to).notes: scroll_to via batch caused WebSocket timeout (app crash recovery needed)

look scope filtering.notes: scope parameter does not filter output; returns all elements regardless of container

look compact mode.notes: Second compact call returns full output, not diff; batch may not maintain look session state

find by predicate.notes: Found 27 buttons with type == 'button', all correct type

read element properties.notes: read command requires accessibility ID; test app elements lack explicit accessibility identifiers

screen name.notes: Returns screen_id, VC type, tab info, navigation stack, can_go_back

appearance toggle.notes: dark and light modes switched cleanly, both returned ok

network monitoring.notes: Captured 1 HTTP request after tapping Fetch HTTP; start/log/stop all succeeded

console capture.notes: start/log/stop succeeded; 0 lines captured (test app doesn't log on tap, but functional flow works)

timeline flight recorder.notes: Returned 100 events including screen transitions and commands

vars inspect.notes: 2 instances (NestedState, AppState) with full property listings

snapshot save and diff.notes: Batch with snapshot save + tap + snapshot diff caused app crash (WebSocket lost)

look on empty screen.notes: Returns without error on Controls tab

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns 'not_in_tree' error with clear message, no crash
